content.text: After a successful POST /deposit to acct-1, a follow-up GET /balance?account=acct-1 sometimes returns the pre-deposit value. Investigate ledger-api/main.go and the running system, then fix ledger-api/main.go with write_file and call submit_patch.

input.command:
set -e
acct=acct-1
before=$(curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=$acct")
echo before:$before
resp=$(curl -s -X POST "$API_URL/deposit" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"account":"acct-1","amount_cents":7}')
echo dep:$resp
sleep 0.5
for i in $(seq 1 5); do curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=$acct"; echo; sleep 0.1; done
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -Atc "select pg_current_wal_lsn(), pg_current_wal_flush_lsn()"; psql "$REPLICA_URL" -Atc "select pg_is_in_recovery(), pg_last_wal_replay_lsn()"

resp=$(curl -s -X POST "$API_URL/deposit" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"account":"acct-1","amount_cents":9}')
echo dep:$resp
for delay in 0 0.1 0.3; do sleep $delay; echo -n "delay $delay "; curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=acct-1"; echo; done
